---
title: "Instructor notes: Episode 1"
---

::: {.callout-note}
These notes supplement the inline instructor notes embedded in
[Episode 1](../episodes/01-introduction.qmd). They are only rendered in the instructor build.
:::

## Summary

<!-- One short paragraph on what this episode covers and where it fits in the lesson arc. -->

## Estimated time

| Component | Time |
|-----------|------|
| Introduction | XX min |
| Section 1 | XX min |
| Exercise 1.1 | XX min |
| Section 2 | XX min |
| Wrap-up / key points | XX min |
| **Total** | **XX min** |

## Learning objectives — instructor read

<!-- Restate the learning objectives here with additional context on what "success"
     looks like for each one. What does it mean for a learner to have achieved it? -->

- Objective 1: ...
- Objective 2: ...
- Objective 3: ...

## Before you teach this episode

<!-- What do instructors need to know, prepare, or have ready? -->

- Confirm dataset is downloaded and accessible.
- Note any version-sensitive code (which package version was used?).
- Suggest opening the exercise solution in a separate script so you can refer to it
  quickly during the session.

## Common learner errors

| Error | Likely cause | Suggested response |
|-------|-------------|-------------------|
| Error message here | Cause | What to say/do |

## Discussion and reflection prompts

<!-- Questions you can pose to the group at different points in the episode. -->

1. After the introduction: *"Before we dive in — has anyone encountered X before? What did you use?"*
2. After Exercise 1.1: *"What surprised you about the output? Was it what you expected?"*

## Modifications and adaptations

<!-- Suggestions for shortening, lengthening, or adjusting the episode for different audiences. -->

**If time is short:** Skip Exercise 1.1 and walk through the solution instead.

**If audience is more advanced:** Replace Exercise 1.1 with the following extension task:

```r
# Extension exercise here
```

## Notes from past deliveries

<!-- After you teach it, note what worked, what didn't, and any fixes needed. -->

- NA
